g.text: Title: Tsumikoro TMC2130 Dual Stepper Driver

g.desc: Title: Tsumikoro TMC2130 Dual Stepper Driver

g.text: Motor supply: bus V+ or external DC jack

g.text: Tsumikoro TMC2130 Dual Stepper Controller — rev 0.1

g.desc: Tsumikoro TMC2130 Dual Stepper Controller — rev 0.1

g.text: MCU: STM32G071G8U6 (UFQFPN-28, same as firmware/tsumikoro-ministepper target)

g.desc: MCU: STM32G071G8U6 (UFQFPN-28, same as firmware/tsumikoro-ministepper target)

g.text: Logic supply: 3.3V from TPS54061 PSU sub-sheet (sized for ~100mA logic + 2x TMC2130 VCC_IO)

g.desc: Logic supply: 3.3V from TPS54061 PSU sub-sheet (sized for ~100mA logic + 2x TMC2130 VCC_IO)

g.text: Motor supply: VPP — from bus V+ (via JBUS1/JBUS2 pin 1) or external JPWR DC jack,

g.desc: Motor supply: VPP — from bus V+ (via JBUS1/JBUS2 pin 1) or external JPWR DC jack,

g.text: Schottky-OR'd so whichever source is highest wins.

g.desc: Schottky-OR'd so whichever source is highest wins.

g.text: Sense resistors: 0.1 ohm 1% 1210 (2x per TMC) -> ~1.6A RMS max with VFS=325mV

g.desc: Sense resistors: 0.1 ohm 1% 1210 (2x per TMC) -> ~1.6A RMS max with VFS=325mV

g.text: RS-485 bus: USART2 on PA2/PA3 (no SYSCFG remap needed unlike servo's G030)

g.desc: RS-485 bus: USART2 on PA2/PA3 (no SYSCFG remap needed unlike servo's G030)

g.text: Components placed but NOT wired — wiring pending in KiCad editor.

g.desc: Components placed but NOT wired — wiring pending in KiCad editor.
